name: @astralhq/server
description: AstralHQ API — Express, Prisma, JWT, RBAC

scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-db.js && cp .env.sqlite .env && prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma && nodemon
scripts.setup:local: cp .env.sqlite .env && mkdir -p data && prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma && rm -f data/dev.db prisma/dev.db prisma/prisma/dev.db && prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma && chmod 664 data/dev.db 2>/dev/null; chmod 775 data 2>/dev/null; node prisma/seed.js
